title: Severe Storms Move Into the Northeast

source.title: Severe storms in the Northeast after deadly tornado outbreak in the Midwest

segments.title: Breaking Weather News
segments.audioText: Good evening. We begin tonight here with breaking news.
segments.transcript: Good evening. We begin tonight here with breaking news.
segments.translationZh: 晚上好。今晚我哋由突發新聞開始。

points.label: Good evening
points.explanationZh: 晚間新聞常見開場；evening 嘅 v 音要輕輕咬下唇。

points.label: We begin tonight
points.explanationZh: begin tonight 即今晚由呢件事開始；聽到 begin 就知主持帶入主題。

points.label: with breaking news
points.explanationZh: breaking news 係突發新聞；with 後面講今集開場焦點。

segments.title: Storm Alerts
segments.audioText: Severe storms in the Northeast are putting more than 60 million under alerts.
segments.transcript: Severe storms in the Northeast are putting more than 60 million under alerts.
segments.translationZh: 美國東北部嘅強烈風暴令超過六千萬人處於警報之下。

points.label: Severe storms
points.explanationZh: severe 係嚴重、強烈；同 storms 放埋一齊即強烈風暴。

points.label: in the Northeast
points.explanationZh: Northeast 指美國東北部；新聞常用地區名做快速定位。

points.label: more than 60 million under alerts
points.explanationZh: more than 60 million 即超過六千萬；under alerts 即受警報影響。

segments.title: Possible Hazards
segments.audioText: The storms bring the possibility of dangerous thunderstorms, large hail and damaging winds.
segments.transcript: The storms bring the possibility of dangerous thunderstorms, large hail and damaging winds.
segments.translationZh: 呢啲風暴可能帶來危險雷暴、大冰雹同破壞性強風。

points.label: bring the possibility of
points.explanationZh: 意思係『帶來……嘅可能』；新聞講風險時好常見。

points.label: dangerous thunderstorms
points.explanationZh: thunderstorms 係雷暴；dangerous 放前面強調有危險。

points.label: large hail and damaging winds
points.explanationZh: hail 係冰雹；damaging winds 係會造成破壞嘅強風。

segments.title: Midwest Tornadoes
segments.audioText: More than 50 reported tornadoes tore across the Midwest, killing three.
segments.transcript: More than 50 reported tornadoes tore across the Midwest, killing three.
segments.translationZh: 超過五十宗通報龍捲風吹襲美國中西部，造成三人死亡。

points.label: More than 50 reported tornadoes
points.explanationZh: reported tornadoes 即已通報或記錄嘅龍捲風；先抓數字 more than 50。

points.label: tore across the Midwest
points.explanationZh: tore across 係快速猛烈掃過；Midwest 指美國中西部。

points.label: killing three
points.explanationZh: 句尾用 -ing 補充結果；呢度係造成三人死亡。

sentences: Good evening. We begin tonight here with breaking news.
Severe storms in the Northeast are putting more than 60 million under alerts.
The storms bring the possibility of dangerous thunderstorms, large hail and damaging winds.
More than 50 reported tornadoes tore across the Midwest, killing three.

vocabulary.translationZh: 今晚預計會有強烈風暴。

vocabulary.example: We got a weather alert on our phones.
vocabulary.translationZh: 我哋電話收到天氣警報。

vocabulary.example: There is a possibility of rain later.
A tornado warning was issued for the county.
vocabulary.translationZh: 當局向該縣發出龍捲風警告。

phrases.example: We begin tonight with breaking news.
More than 60 million people are under alerts.
The forecast shows the possibility of thunderstorms.
Damaging winds could hit the area tonight.

speakingPractice.instructionZh: 由 00:05 跟讀 Severe storms in the Northeast are putting more than 60 million under alerts. 先分成三段讀。
重播 00:15，先聽寫 dangerous thunderstorms，再補 large hail and damaging winds。
用 under alerts 練替換：The city is under alerts. / Many counties are under alerts.
用兩句英文複述：Severe storms are moving into the Northeast. More than 60 million people are under alerts.

notes: 今日片段係 ABC News / World News Tonight 約 2 分 57 秒嘅天氣新聞，主題係強烈風暴同警報。
聽力重點係抓天氣風險詞：severe storms、alerts、thunderstorms、hail、damaging winds。
時間碼 00:00、00:05、00:15、00:27 可以逐句重播；先盲聽數字同地點，再看稿補完整句。
dailyLifePractice 會轉去較輕鬆嘅日常情境：改約時間、查天氣同解釋延誤。

dailyLifePractice.title: Checking Plans Because of Weather
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：天氣唔穩定，你想同朋友確認今晚仲出唔出去。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Hey, are we still on for tonight? The weather looks pretty rough. I'm okay with rescheduling if that works better.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Hey, are we still on for tonight?
lines.zh: 喂，我哋今晚仲照原定嗎？

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.en: I'm not sure. The weather looks pretty rough.
lines.zh: 我唔太肯定。天氣睇落幾差。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I'm okay with rescheduling if that works better.
lines.zh: 如果改期方便啲，我都可以。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.zh: 我哋一個鐘後再決定啦。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Are we still on for tonight? 係好自然嘅美式問法，意思係『今晚仲照舊嗎？』pretty rough 講天氣時係口語，表示幾差、幾麻煩。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 tonight 換成 tomorrow morning、this weekend 或 lunch。
drills.example: Are we still on for lunch?

drills.label: Polite rephrase
drills.prompt: 用 I'm okay with... 表示你可以改時間。
drills.example: I'm okay with moving it to tomorrow.

dailyLifePractice.title: Asking About the Forecast
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你同同事準備出門食午餐，想快快問天氣會唔會影響。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Did you check the forecast? It says storms could roll in later. Maybe we should grab something close by.

lines.speaker: Coworker
lines.en: Not yet. Is it supposed to rain?

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: It says storms could roll in later.
lines.zh: 佢話遲啲可能有風暴過嚟。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Maybe we should grab something close by.
lines.zh: 或者我哋喺附近買啲嘢食算啦。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: roll in 用嚟講天氣好自然，表示天氣系統慢慢過嚟。grab something close by 係口語講『喺附近搵啲嘢食』。

drills.label: Quick repeat
drills.prompt: 跟讀 Did you check the forecast? 三次，語氣自然上揚。

drills.label: Say-it-your-way
drills.prompt: 用 Maybe we should... 提議一個簡單改動。
drills.example: Maybe we should take the train instead.

dailyLifePractice.title: Explaining a Weather Delay
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你因為大雨或交通慢，想簡短通知對方會遲少少。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Quick heads-up: the rain is slowing everything down. I might be about ten minutes late. I'll let you know when I'm close.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Quick heads-up: the rain is slowing everything down.
lines.zh: 提提你：大雨令所有嘢都慢咗。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I might be about ten minutes late.
lines.zh: 我可能會遲大約十分鐘。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I'll let you know when I'm close.

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Quick heads-up 係自然又有禮貌嘅『先通知你一聲』。slowing everything down 好口語，適合講天氣、交通或排隊。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 ten minutes 換成 five minutes、a few minutes 或 fifteen minutes。
drills.example: I might be about five minutes late.

drills.label: Short response practice
drills.prompt: 對方話 Take your time，你用一句英文回應。
